name: GOLFTEC Westport
about: GOLFTEC Westport is a specialized golf training studio focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching. Services include private golf lessons, club fittings with top brands, and practice memberships. The facility is designed for golfers seeking structured improvement through objective feedback and professional guidance.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology
Personalized improvement plans from certified PGA coaches
Advanced launch monitor technology for precise feedback
Custom club fitting with major brands
Practice memberships with training bay access

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned for club fitting and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs during lessons and practice. GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and offers custom club fitting services with top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or beverage service is mentioned. It's recommended to check with the location directly for their policy on outside food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: While not specifically mentioned, typical simulator play at similar facilities takes 1.5-2 hours for 18 holes, depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and youth coaching, making it suitable for younger golfers looking to improve their skills through professional instruction.
